hero.title: AI & Robotics Engineer
hero.subtitle: Research Associate at ASRC · MSc AI & Big Data Computing
hero.description: Building intelligent inspection systems at the intersection of hyperspectral imaging, computer vision, and industrial automation for aviation and infrastructure.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a research associate and engineer at the Aviation Services Research Centre (ASRC), specializing in AI-powered inspection systems for aviation maintenance. My work spans hyperspectral imaging, deep learning, robotic vision, and PLC-controlled automation.
about.p2: With an MSc in Artificial Intelligence and Big Data Computing from PolyU and a BEng in Computer and Data Engineering from CityU, I combine academic rigor with hands-on engineering — from CNN, YOLO, and RAG models to full-stack inspection platforms deployed in production environments.
about.hl1Desc: HSI oxidation detection for Boeing, HAECO & HAESL
about.hl2Desc: ABB vision pipeline & Siemens PLC control systems

education.title: Education
education.subtitle: Thank you to every professor who shared their knowledge with me

polyu.degree: MSc. Artificial Intelligence and Big Data Computing

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: Thank you to the companies that helped me grow along the way

p1.title: Aviation Coating and Paint Analysis
p1.li1: Investigated hyperspectral imaging (HSI) feasibility for oxidation degree estimation and analyzed the correlation between HSI and oxidation corrosion depth for Boeing, HAECO, and HAESL
p1.li2: Processed and analyzed hyperspectral datasets with four hundred spectral bands, line charts for corrosion assessment
p1.li3: Implemented a novel CNN model in the aluminum oxidation depth detection system, achieving an accuracy of 0.846 — became one of ASRC's product prototypes for assessing oxidation under coatings

p2.title: Automatic Bolt Inspection, Cleaning, and Sorting
p2.li1: Designed an AI-powered robotic vision system for automated bolt defect detection including cracks, deformities, and surface imperfections
p2.li2: Developed a hybrid 2D/3D vision pipeline for an ABB robot arm using 2D PCA for bolt localization and 3D ICP for precise 6-DoF picking
p2.li3: Developed Ladder Logic for Siemens CPU-1215c PLC controlling a 4-axis robotic system with G-code PC interface
p2.li4: Built a Windows application using C# and XAML for image processing, PLC monitoring, and REST API integration
p2.li5: Developed a Python Inspection System with SAM3, deformity detection, and rust/crack segmentation, containerized with Docker — reduced CPU usage from 11.1% to 4.9% and processing time from 1.858s to 1.308s

p1.title: Automatic Pool Control System
p1.li1: Developed an automated water quality monitoring and chemical dosing system using LabVIEW for Ocean Park Water World
p1.li2: Implemented real-time data acquisition and PID control for pH, chlorine, and temperature with alarm management and predictive maintenance

p2.title: Mobile Laser Scanning and Imagery System
p2.li1: Developed C# applications for processing mobile laser scanning point cloud data for Freetech and GovHK Highways Department
p2.li2: Implemented C++ algorithms for 3D point cloud processing and automated road surface condition analysis
p2.li3: Created automated reporting tools for highway condition assessment with GIS integration

p1.title: Aluminum Oxidation Detection
p1.desc: CNN-based HSI system for non-destructive oxidation assessment under coatings — 84.6% accuracy, deployed as ASRC product prototype.

p2.title: Bolt Inspection System
p2.desc: End-to-end AI robotic system with 2D/3D vision, PLC automation, C# UI, and Dockerized Python inspection API.

p3.title: Scholar RAG System
p3.desc: Retrieval-augmented generation application for scholars' personal paper search and question answering.

p4.title: Pool Control System
p4.desc: LabVIEW-based automated water quality monitoring and chemical dosing for Ocean Park Water World.

p5.title: Road Scanning System
p5.desc: Mobile laser scanning point cloud processing and automated highway condition reporting with GIS.
